name: Ring intro completes and leaves all iteration segments visible
description: On page load the ring plays a short draw-in intro; within a few seconds every iteration arc segment is fully visible, the centered iteration count matches the iteration log entries, and the orbiting dot is moving around the ring.

planSteps.description: Wait about three seconds for the ring's draw-in intro to finish

Verify the circular ring shows colored arc segments (green or red) forming a full circle around a centered iteration count, and that the count equals the number of entries in the ITERATION LOG section below
Verify a small bright dot is present on the ring's circumference and changes position over time (orbiting), rather than being static
